nasb.text: Now the king was sitting in the winter house in the ninth month, with a fire burning in the brazier before him.

esv.text: It was the ninth month, and the king was sitting in the winter house, and there was a fire burning in the fire pot before him.

cnv.text: 那時正是九月，王坐在冬宮裡，在他面前有一盆炭火燒著。

ccb.text: 那时正是九月，王坐在冬宫，面前摆着一盆炭火。
